description_long: This is a small athletic shoe designed for children, featuring a predominantly black and red color scheme. The upper part of the shoe is made of synthetic mesh and fabric, with a red heel and strap, and a black toe box and side panels. The closure system consists of a single red Velcro strap and elastic bands in place of traditional laces, providing easy fastening for young users. The sole is white, thick, and appears to be made of lightweight foam or rubber, offering cushioning and flexibility. There is a visible 'X' mark on the outer heel and branding text on the Velcro strap. The shoe shows minimal signs of wear, with the materials and stitching appearing intact and clean.
description: A child's athletic shoe with a black and red upper, white foam sole, Velcro strap, and minimal wear. Features branding on the strap and an 'X' mark on the heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black toe, red upper, white sole, and Velcro strap across the top.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the red heel, pull tab, and the white sole wrapping around the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the 'X' mark on the heel, open Velcro strap, and the black-to-red color transition.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the black toe box, red elastic bands, and the branding on the Velcro strap.
